case_title: EPHRAIM CUBERO BACUS VS. LOUISE MAY KARU

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BACUS, EPHRAIM CUBERO AS TO DEFENDANT KARU, LOUISE MAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO JUDGE PRO TEM. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY BACUS, EPHRAIM CUBERO KARU, LOUISE MAY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $200.00) SERVED DEC-04-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KARU, LOUISE MAY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF EPHRAIM CUBERO BACUS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LOUISE MAY KARU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT STIPULATED TO JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-26-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-18-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF EPHRAIM CUBERO BACUS. DEFENDANT LOUISE MAY KARU DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT KARU, LOUISE MAY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BACUS, EPHRAIM CUBERO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARU, LOUISE MAY $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,275.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
